programme.desc: Comedian Nick Kroll's cast of sketch comedy characters includes Bobby Bottleservice, Liz G. and Aspen Bruckheimer. Can any of them stand the heat of Zombie Apocalypse and Da Bomb Beyond Insanity?

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Philip DeFranco Sets a YouTube Record While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: As they fend off the Scoville onslaught, Sean and Philip get into the weeds of YouTube history, unpackage the problems with contemporary media and reveal photographic evidence of a bygone era when Sean actually had a six-pack.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Halsey Experiences the Jersey Devil While Eating Spicy Wings

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Kenan Thompson Becomes a Card-Carrying Spiceman While Eating Spicy Wings

programme.title: Hot Ones

programme.desc: Awkwafina is the Golden Globe Award-winning actress from films like "Crazy Rich Asians" and "The Farewell."

programme.sub-title: Theo Von Fights the Dark Arts While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: The Rat King takes on the wings of death and chats with Sean Evans as if they were lifelong buddies. Theo talks about climbing Mount Kilimanjaro, capturing chimps in Louisiana and adapting to the L.A. lifestyle.

programme.title: Hot Ones
programme.sub-title: Tom Segura Keeps It High and Tight While Eating Spicy Wings
programme.desc: Watch Tom Segura reunite with Sean Evans over a brand new hot sauce lineup, discussing everything from Dave Chappelle's surprise special to his beef with pro wrestling and love for Missy Elliott.

programme.title: Stuart Laws: Stuart Laws does an hour of Standup Comedy
programme.desc: aws is one of the most skilled and likeable comics on the circuit' (Scotsman) and 'echoes the late, great Sean Lock' (BeyondTheJoke.co.uk). Watch him do an hour of comedy. If you've made it this far you should know this will be free-wheeling, big chunks improvised, some old classics – basically changing every time and a chance for Stuart to not worry about structural callbacks and messages.

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Sharon offers Tracey a job. Dorien's gambling losses prevent her from paying the rent.

programme.title: Not Another Happy Ending
programme.desc: When struggling publisher Tom Duval discovers his only successful author, Jane Lockhart, has writer's block, he knows he has to fix the problem.

programme.title: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: An FBI agent reprises his disguise as an old lady to become a nanny in a crime suspect's house.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: Two middle-aged salesmen start a coveted internship at Google.

programme.title: Toxic Boyfriend Forces Girl to Quit School
programme.desc: Anaya rejects her fiancé Varun and family to pursue surgery over marriage. 20 years later, as a top surgeon, she is asked to save the life of her now-impoverished ex-fiancé. She agrees, proving the worth of her dreams and the power of her success.

programme.title: Billionaire Dates Poor Person for Publicity
programme.desc: Struggling actress Olivia lands a lead role and dates her wealthy costar, Colin, as part of a plan to secure her family's future. She eventually realizes she's falling for his humble bodyguard, Henry, and breaks up with Colin to pursue real love and her dreams.

programme.title: Nerd Goes on a Date with Hot Girl
programme.desc: Felix pays Mac to learn manipulative pickup tactics to win Teresa. Mac's advice fails, but Felix succeeds by being himself. Mac's schemes backfire when his crush rejects him and his car is towed, proving that playing games only gets you played.

programme.title: Influencer Stalked By Fan
programme.desc: A famous influencer's family is terrorized by an obsessed fan. Her husband, initially dismissive, realizes the danger. He bravely confronts the stalker, saving his family and highlighting that true strength lies in unity and protecting loved ones.

programme.title: New Cool Kid Steals Shy Kid's Girl
programme.desc: Middle schooler Kyle's jealousy over new student Archie threatens his chance with crush Candace. Guided by his father Darrel, Kyle faces his insecurities. He apologizes, and both Kyle and his parents reconcile their relationships at the school dance.

programme.title: Teacher Secretly A Gaming Pro
programme.desc: Rob, a lazy gamer, faces expulsion. His science teacher, Mr. Brown, connects with him through Genshin Impact, motivating Rob to apply himself. Rob excels, creating a unique science fair project, winning back his girlfriend, and earning his parents' pride.

programme.title: Students Find Out Teacher Is War Hero on Veteran's Day
programme.desc: Arrogant student Caleb mocks a woman for parking in a veteran's spot. He later discovers she is "Halo Harry," the war hero who saved his father's life, leading him to redefine what a hero truly is.

programme.title: TikToker Risks It All For Views
programme.desc: Teen Lamar risks his life with dangerous TikTok stunts to gain followers and win Lisa's attention. After a near-fatal challenge lands him in the hospital, he changes his content, focuses on his mental health, and finds genuine connection.

programme.title: Orphan Kid Becomes Karate Master
programme.desc: Bullied orphan Fletcher, inspired by Jackie Chan, learns martial arts from a kind dojo owner, Daniel. When his estranged biological father, a powerful politician, reappears seeking an endorsement, Fletcher exposes his past, saving Daniel's dojo and launching his own career.

programme.title: Dad Risks Everything to Save His Son
programme.desc: Jax, a tough criminal, struggles with anxiety and guilt from his past, exacerbated by his son's worsening illness. After a botched robbery, a sympathetic victim offers Jax a chance at redemption, leading him to a new life and healing.

programme.title: Oprhan Teen Saves 1,000's Of Lives
programme.desc: A skilled hacker, Miles, caught between his manipulative mentor and a kind neighbor, chooses to do good, alerting the FBI to his mentor's crimes. His cooperation leads to a second chance, a new purpose, and a real family.

programme.title: From Cheerleader Rivalry to Respect
programme.desc: Mean girl Samantha, obsessed with perfection, gets a magic cream that turns her beautiful facade hideous. Humiliated and abandoned, she learns a harsh lesson about inner beauty, prompting a transformation that earns her genuine friendships.

programme.title: Foster Girl Is Overnight Billionaire

programme.title: Influencer Mom Forgets Her Child While Shopping

programme.title: Jodha Akbar
programme.desc: Jodha Akbar is a period drama set in the sixteenth century, focusing on the political marriage between Mughal Emperor Akbar and Rajput Princess Jodha Bai. Initially a marriage of convenience, it evolves into a deep love story that changes the fate of India. The series portrays the era's wars, the complex relationships between the Mughals and Rajputs, and the political dynamics of the royal court. Akbar, raised as a ruthless conqueror, learns the meaning of love and compassion through Jodha, who despises the Mughals for their invasions. Their relationship transforms Akbar from a heartless ruler into the beloved Emperor Akbar, known for his justice and wisdom.

programme.desc: After hearing that total funds for the Dreams will be cut by 30 percent in comparison to the previous year, Seung Su and the management team go into salary negotiations with a determined attitude. programme.title: Hot Stove League Ep.8 (English Dub)
programme.desc: Despite initial roadblocks in salary negotiations, the Dreams and various players work out their differences and negotiate their contracts. Meanwhile, the controversy surrounding Chang Ju's interview on TV and Yeong Su's employment leads to Seung Su receiving some bad news.

programme.title: Hot Stove League Ep.9 (English Dub)
programme.desc: General Manager Seung Su agrees to resign from his post, and Se Young becomes interim general manager. The Dreams manages to bring good results at the 2019 KPB Rule 5 Draft, and a sudden interview held with Chang Ju surprises many people and leads to unexpected outcomes.

programme.title: Hot Stove League Ep.10 (English Dub)
programme.desc: The players' association goes against the Dreams hosting practice sessions with their coaches during the off-season. General Manager Seung Su argues that it's only right that even players with lower salaries are allowed to practice and not pressured to rest during the two months.

programme.title: Hot Stove League Ep.11 (English Dub)
programme.desc: Kyeong Min orders Seung Su to cancel plans for the players of the Dreams to go abroad for off-season training. Seung Su convinces three special instructors with a not-so-pleasant history with the team to train the players during the off-season.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.9
programme.desc: Mi Young develops genuine feelings for Gun, and Gun in turn starts to fall for Mi Young's new side. Se Ra asks Mi Young point-blank if she loves Gun, leaving her rattled, while Daniel feels sorry that Mi Young keeps getting the short end of the stick. Gun revises the divorce agreement he drafted with Mi Young.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.10
programme.desc: News about Gun and Mi Young spreads publicly, and Gun is oddly pleased. While rummaging through the house after his plan goes awry, Yong's mom discovers a suspicious set of divorce papers. Learning the marriage is a contract, Se Ra goes to see Gun again, while Mi Young ends up meeting Daniel when Gun doesn't show up to their appointment.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.11
programme.desc: Waking up in the hospital, Gun shows symptoms suggesting a hereditary illness and doesn't remember Mi Young. Though confused and hurt, she stays by his side. Se Ra seizes the chance to be with Gun as much as possible, but as she realizes how strong Gun and Mi Young's bond still is, she feels threatened.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.12
programme.desc: Mi Young attends the final prenatal class alone—until Gun unexpectedly shows up. Gun breaks up with Se Ra, and Se Ra asks Mi Young to break up with Gun. Overwhelmed, Mi Young tells Daniel, who is leaving for France, that she wants to go with him.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.13
programme.desc: Mi Young makes a successful exhibition debut with Daniel, and when Gun sees them together, jealousy flares. Chairwoman Wang is still pulling every string to get Gun married, but it isn't easy Se Ra is bitter about their lack of progress. Meanwhile, Mi Young runs into Gun outside her hotel room.

programme.title: You are My Destiny Ep.14
programme.desc: Daniel finally finds the younger sister he has been searching for, and Gun is crestfallen to hear Mi Young plans to return to France. Yong suggests recruiting a female artist as a key strategic move for the company—and recommends Mi Young—but she turns Gun's business proposal down. Meanwhile, Daniel formally proposes to Mi Young.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.7
programme.desc: Completely unaware of the storm the worst-ever grievance letter is about to trigger, the company members feel only relief that their training is finally over. While Min-seok is overjoyed at the news of a company dinner, the Commander's expression remains grimly determined as he prepares to report to the Battalion Commander. Meanwhile, due to his worsening back pain, Il-gu is ordered to stay in the hospital for an extra day. However, the ward is filled with bizarre patients, making the hospital feel even less comfortable than the barracks.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.8
programme.desc: Il-gu prepares to return to the unit as his discharge from the hospital approaches. However, instead of a warm welcome from his comrades, he is met with the sight of senior enlisted men—corporals and sergeants—crammed into the multi-purpose room, busy writing statements. Brushing it off at first, Il-gu happens to pass by the administrative office and freezes in his tracks after spotting a single sheet of paper. It is a disciplinary list, and it contains the names of nearly every corporal and sergeant in the entire unit.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.9
programme.desc: Following the massive disciplinary fallout triggered by the grievance letter, the senior corporals and sergeants begin to give the lower-ranking privates the silent treatment, treating them like ghosts. Under Cha Hoon's orders, Noh Hee-jeong attempts to steal the letter from the Commander's office, only to be caught red-handed. Suspecting Dong-woo—who has a history of writing grievance letters—Cha Hoon threatens him to find the real culprit within twenty-four hours. Under immense psychological pressure, Dong-woo's eyes fixate on a target: none other than Min-seok.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.10
programme.desc: The atmosphere of the 2nd Company spirals toward a total breakdown due to the bitter hostility between the seniors and juniors. Pushed to his limit by the stress of desperately searching for the culprit, Dong-woo begins to drive his successors with increasing aggression and violence. Watching Dong-woo's descent with a heavy heart, Min-seok finally reveals a shocking truth: he saw Chan-seok slipping a piece of paper into the Company Commander's office.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.11
programme.desc: While the unit is still in turmoil over the grievance letter, the Company Commander exposes the truth behind it in front of all personnel. Finding the Commander's words hard to accept, Cha Hoon argues back on behalf of the senior soldiers, but the Commander—claiming they show no signs of remorse—orders every corporal and sergeant to assemble on the parade ground. Just as everyone is reluctantly bracing for a mass punishment, the First Sergeant steps in to block the Commander's path.

programme.title: New Recruit Season.2 Ep.12

programme.title: The Biblical Plagues
programme.desc: The Biblical Plagues - Darkness over Egypt: For a long time, scientists have tried to prove that nine of the Ten Plagues described in the Old Testament point to a serious breakdown of the climate, triggering an ecological chain reaction. Apart from theological considerations, scholars all over the world have studied individual phenomena, trying to explain the causes of this Biblical disaster.

programme.title: The Biblical Plagues
programme.desc: The Biblical Plagues - Flight from Egypt: Although nine disastrous plagues had already devastated the land along the Nile, Pharaoh remained stubborn and would not release Moses and his people from slavery. And so their God, Yahweh, planned his final assault: At midnight, he sent death over Egypt – all the firstborn, Man or beats, had to die … there was no escape.

programme.title: Monsters and Myths
programme.desc: Monsters have always been part of our nightmares and fairy tales. But where do they actually come from? How much of them is truth, how much is myth? programme.title: Return of the Bible Plagues
programme.desc: Return of the Bible Plagues - Deadly Waters: “... all the waters that were in the river [Nile] were turned to blood. And all the fish that was in the river died,” reports the Bible, “and the river stank, and the Egyptians could not drink of the water of the river.” (Exodus 7:20–21).

programme.title: Return of the Bible Plagues
programme.desc: Return of the Bible Plagues - Mosquitos: “… so there were lice upon man, and upon beast,” reports the Bible, “all the dust of the land became lice throughout all the land of Egypt.” (Exodus 8:18, 17). Even today, two million people die every year from malaria transmitted by mosquitoes, mainly in Africa.

programme.title: Return of the Bible Plagues
programme.desc: Return of the Bible Plagues - Hailstorm: “… and the Lord sent thunder and hail, … and fire mingled with the hail,” reports the Old Testament. “And the hail smote … all that was in the field, both man and beast.” (Exodus 9:23–25).

programme.title: Best of the Best

programme.desc: Collector car expert Bill Stephens and Keith Martin appraise classic European sport cars, including a 1954 Jaguar XK120 M Roadster and a 1967 Maserati Mexico Speciale.

programme.desc: Most Haunted visits Crewe's Lyceum Theatre, haunted by a dancing woman in white on a graveyard site.

programme.desc: Most Haunted explores Whittington Castle, chasing ghost tales and the legendary Marian Chalice.

programme.title: A Shot in the Dark

programme.desc: TAPS is invited to Lemp Mansion in St. Louis where a father and three of his children took their own lives.

programme.desc: The home of author James Thurber is probed in Columbus, Ohio.

programme.title: The Chopping Block
programme.desc: TAPS returns to Mansfield, Ohio to investigate the Bissman Building.

programme.title: The Oldest House in Georgia
programme.desc: TAPS starts out at the Ulster County Jail in Kingston, NY, where inmates and personal have witnessed activity.

programme.title: Legends Of The Pharaohs
programme.desc: He was one of the most controversial figures of all Antiquity. Crowned pharaoh as Amenhotep IV, he changed his name to Akhenaten whilst repudiating the gods of his ancestors. What role did the enigmatic Akhenaten really play in Egyptian history?

programme.title: Alien Disclosure Files
programme.desc: Physicist Enrico Fermi posited his famous paradox in the early 1950s, asking if intelligent life is so likely to occur in the vastness of the universe, then why hasn't any of it contacted the Earth?

programme.title: What On Earth?
programme.desc: Satellites capture unusual images including markings in the desert, while a strange symbol could be a portal into a lost South American civilisation.

programme.title: Legends Of The Pharaohs
programme.desc: The discovery of the bust of Nefertiti, in the early 20th century, is quite a comeback for a woman whose contemporaries swore to erase her from the history books! Was she really guilty of having brought about chaos in the kingdom?

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened
programme.desc: In 1964, while Charles James Hall was stationed at Nellis Air Force Base in Nevada, he encountered an alien race he refers to as the "Tall Whites". He claims they were working with the US military and housed a spaceship in a secret hangar nearby.

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: Investigating the disappearance of Australian pilot Frederick Valentich, whose last transmission gives a disturbing account of what he experienced.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Discover doorways to wormholes in time, their secret locations around the world, as well as who is trying to open them and why.

programme.title: Conspiracy Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Those in power have secrets they do not want average citizens to know.

programme.title: Evidence Of The Unexplained
programme.desc: A mysterious opening caught on camera on the Red Planet – could this be a gateway to a base on Mars? A UFO appears to invade an Amazon village and leaves a trail of victims – and an unidentified craft gate-crashes the Queen's Jubilee celebration.

programme.title: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The underbelly of this great house is a sharp contrast to its upper grandeur. Some members of the team are forced to run while other are lost in the labyrinth of tunnels and passageways pursued by something unnatural.

programme.title: Oakwell House
programme.desc: The team investigate Oakwell House near Leeds, which was built by ancestors of Fred Batt. In 1684, William Batt returned unexpectedly from a trip to London but vanished leaving a bloody footprint. A demon dog has been seen in the grounds.

programme.title: Knottingley Town Hall
programme.desc: This location is said to be overflowing with paranormal activity, which doesn't disappoint.

programme.title: Capesthorne Hall
programme.desc: The beauty of this magnificent Cheshire country house hides the horror that lies in its corridors. As well a poltergeist activity the team manage to catch some of their best evidence to date and even our sceptic hears noises.

programme.title: 30 East Drive_PT1
programme.desc: 30 East Drive is said to house the most violent poltergeist in the world. The team go head first into what becomes their toughest challenge yet. As soon as they enter the property something is waiting and wants to be known.

programme.title: 30 East Drive_PT2
programme.desc: The team continue their most threatening investigation yet and for some they will be scared for life mentally and physically. The most violent poltergeist in the world is ready for a fight...but who wins?

programme.title: Thackray Museum
programme.desc: The medical museum houses a great many objects from its distant hospital and workhouse past with a complete Victorian street scene on the lower level.

programme.title: Armley Mills
programme.desc: Once the centre of industry Armley Mills is now a museum that is said to house the phantoms of many a lost soul. From children who were caught in the machinery to a bad tempered floorwalker who doesn't like people in his mill.

programme.title: Past Life Regression Pt. 2
programme.desc: Richard witnesses a municipal employee in Toronto, Canada undergo a regression during which he re-experiences a previous life as a doctor in early 20 century England.

programme.title: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: Richard investigates a legendary naval military experiment said to have been carried out at the Philadelphia Naval Shipyard in October 1943.

programme.title: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: Pterodactyls
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: Global Warming, A Hoax?
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several journalists and researchers who argue the theory that human use of carbon-based fossil fuels will lead to catastrophic global warming.

programme.title: Pilot-UFO Disclosure
programme.desc: Richard examines the growing UFO Disclosure movement and its attempts to force the US Government to reveal to the public what it knows about UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: The Water Engine
programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water? And was he murdered because of the threat his invention posed to Big Oil?

programme.title: Did Jim Morrison Fake His Death?
programme.desc: Is it conceivable that the Doors legendary front man did not die in a bathtub in Paris of an apparent drug overdose?

programme.title: Crop Circles
programme.desc: For centuries, farmers have been discovering strange, complex geometric patterns comprised of rings, circles and other intricate shapes in their fields.

programme.title: Fluoride
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show investigates the safety and efficacy of putting fluoride in our water supply. Dentists say that putting fluoride in the water supply prevents tooth decay, but some researchers claim it's a toxic substance that causes cancer.

programme.title: PLACES WITH HEALING POWERS
programme.desc: Top 10 Secrets and Mysteries looks at places that are said to have healing power including Lourdes where people have been cured by drinking water from a cave, Machu Picchu, Stonehenge, the Dead Sea, the Ganges.

programme.title: THE MYSTERY AND CULTS OF MUMMIES
programme.desc: Unlock the mystery of mummification from ancient Egypt to present. Explore its fascination and quest for Queen Nefertiti's mummy. Where did 70 million ancient mummies disappear? Delve into Latin American mummy legends.

programme.title: HUMAN SACRIFICES
programme.desc: Human sacrifice, practiced since the Paleolithic era, was seen as a gift to gods for cosmic order. Found in black magic, voodoo, and Satanism, these rituals may hint at a mysterious connection to higher forces.

programme.title: S2 E5 Alien Moons
programme.desc: Explore the moons surrounding the planets of the solar system.

programme.title: S1 E9 Alien Galaxies
programme.desc: Take a look far, far away to the realm of Alien Galaxies.

programme.title: S1 E6 Spaceship Earth
programme.desc: Take a ride through the formation of the third planet from the Sun, Earth.

programme.title: S1 E2 Mars: The Red Planet
programme.desc: It has been fifty years since man first ventured into space.

programme.title: S2 E4 The Milky Way
programme.desc: Now we know we're not even at the center of our own galaxy.

programme.title: S6 E10 Our Place in the Milky Way
programme.desc: An exploration of Earth's cosmic neighborhood.

programme.title: S6 E4 Crash Landing on Mars
programme.desc: We'll show what astronauts must do to survive dust storms and space radiation.

programme.title: S1 E1 Inside the Volcano
programme.desc: 4 billion-year volcano impact on life: empire destruction, visits ahead.

programme.title: Hawaii: Paradise in the Pacific
programme.desc: In episode two we take a look at Maui and Moloka'i. In the middle of the archipelago they form the heart of Hawaii. The second largest island of Hawai'i - Maui - is a true paradise for surfers. Archie Kalepa was one of the first big wave surfers and is still chasing the thrill today

programme.title: Rottnest Island: Kingdom Of The Quokka
programme.desc: Islands worldwide are grand experiments in nature, with their isolation creating unique conditions for animals to diverge from the norm. On the far west of the Australian continent lies Rottnest Island where one of the worlds ‘happiest', yet most vulnerable marsupials the Quokka thrives. How do they survive here in such inhospitable conditions and nowhere else? In a world first, the entire life cycle of the Quokka will be filmed using special natural history filming techniques to expose the secrets of its survival mechanisms.

programme.title: Secret Life Of Baby Owls
programme.desc: This stunning series uncovers 'The Secret Life Of Owls' as never seen before, using a special camera rig to follow families of owls in a wild corner of rural Essex, through winter, spring and summer.

programme.title: Our Big Blue Backyard
programme.desc: Stewart Island, New Zealand's third largest and southernmost island, is a place of dramatic beauty and unpredictability. Here, the Pot-bellied Seahorse father has extra responsibilities, the Octopus is both hunter and hunted, and 82 Great White Sharks need to eat, too. Standing at just 30cm and weighing only 1 kg, the Little Blue Penguin is nonetheless a swift swimmer and a determined parent.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Rhino horn is very expensive in the illegal market and the poachers know it. Kaziranga has the only concentrated population of the one horned Rhino in the world. And poachers are attracted to Kaziranga like ants are to sugar.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Elephant human conflict has been going on in India for decades. Only now it has increased because of the shrinking forests and the expanding human habitation. North Bengal with it's fragmented habitat of tea gardens, human habitation and paddy fields is a hot bed of conflict

programme.title: Wild and Alive
programme.desc: On the savannah of southern Africa, rains have turned the land green and lush. It's the time of plenty and for the cast of wild characters here, cashing in is priority number one.

programme.title: Lions Rule
programme.desc: On the African plains lions rule. They're not the biggest or fastest animals around, but stealth, teamwork and the strength of the pride means they almost always come out on top.

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Railway Lines
programme.desc: In northern Argentina, the world-famous Tren a las Nubes - the cloud train - crosses dizzying viaducts and deep valleys. At an altitude of over 4000 meters, what was once the highest railway runs past cactus forests and into the driest desert in the world. A technical feat in the Andes and a breathtaking ride through spectacular scenery.In northern Argentina, the world-famous Tren a las Nubes - the cloud train - crosses dizzying viaducts and deep valleys. At an altitude of over 4000 meters, what was once the highest railway runs past cactus forests and into the driest desert in the world. A technical feat in the Andes and a breathtaking ride through spectacular scenery.

programme.title: Women Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Alaska - the largest and at the same time most sparsely populated state in the USA. Only about 740,000 people live here. Often far away in small villages. Almost every village has its own airstrip. Aircrafts are one of the main means of transport in Alaska. Jamie Klaes is one of the many female pilots in the country.

programme.title: Women Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Aerobatics is the supreme discipline in air sports. Only a few pilots dare to navigate a machine during loops, drops and steep flights because nausea and blackouts due to the strong G-forces can be life-threatening. But flight instructor Jenny Holmenes is not deterred - she wants to prove her skills. Although she is still a beginner, she competes in the "Sportsman" class at the Norwegian Aerobatic Championships.

programme.title: Women Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Living conditions are harsh in the Australian outback, especially in William Creek. Only 17 people live here, and in summer even less - only two. There is a motel, a campsite, a pub and the only petrol station in a radius of hundreds of miles. The young bush pilot Hannah Jane Cash lives and works here.

programme.title: Women Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Alia Twal is an enthusiastic pilot, globetrotter and adventurer. She is a first officer with the Jordanian airline Royal Jordanian and flies large passenger planes. She climbs the highest mountains in the world, dives with sharks or goes skydiving. Alia particularly enjoys travelling in her Jordanian homeland.

programme.title: Women Above the Clouds
programme.desc: Nepal is one of the poorest countries in the world. Young women are often disadvantaged here and quite a few are married off before the age of 18. Helicopter pilot Priya Adhikari lives and works here. The 38-year-old is an exception and the only woman in Nepal who ventures into the extremely dangerous heights of the Himalayas in her helicopter.

programme.title: Wild River Rhine
programme.desc: Alluvial forests, roaring waterfalls, steep canyons and sunny slopes flank the river Rhine. The variety of habitats is the reason for the large biodiversity along the stream.There is hardly any other river in Germany that is surrounded by as many myths and legends as the river Rhine. No other river has been the topic of songs, has been painted and travelled equally frequently. Despite this it still seems to be true today what the French poet Victor Hugo once said about this river – the Rhine is a river everybody talks about, nobody explores, everybody visits but no one really knows. The film follows the water against the stream. It starts at the river's delta in the Netherlands, flows through six countries and ends in the Swiss Alps.

programme.title: Germany's Mystic Forest
programme.desc: 2.000 rivers and streams dig deep into the underground and transport their water into reservoirs or "Germany's Wild Amazon", the Wupper. These forests and rivers, together with heathlands and moors, are home to a diverse fauna. Martens, badgers, wild boars, hares, roe deer, and red deer, even black grouse and hazel deer find shelter in these parts. Wolves also have a dominant presence, not to mention those who live underground, such as lizards, bats, and snakes. Accompany us on a journey where we explore every corner of this rugged land. Climb underground into the Bergisches Land, through the vast hidden cave systems that sprawl far beneath the forests. There is also much to be discovered in the water, dive with us in crystal clear streams and rivers with their diverse flora and fauna.

programme.title: Bavaria's Alpine Kingdom
programme.desc: There are sparkling palaces from ice and snow, like those found in a fairytale. The icy castles are the phenomenal work of Mother Nature but man had a hand in the magnificent stone castles of the region. The spectacular and histrionic mountains of the Bavarian Alps challenge wildlife and the people who live there and the rocky ramparts of this mountain kingdom are built of limestone and fossil rocks that tell of its origins beneath the sea. Millions of visitors from all over the world come to Bavaria every year to witness the mysticism of the landscape. Kings and Queens, tourist and locals, all are welcomed in the fantastic alpine kingdom. Early summer often comes with the threat of storms that bring floods that scour the land and threaten many creatures. But farmers risk these dangers to take their herds to the highest pastures, where they can graze on the sweetest flower-filled meadows. And later from the high-quality milk produced by their herds, the famers make highly prized cheese. Humankind lives among eagle owls, chamoix, wild cats, stoats and ravens up in these mountains.

programme.title: Parched Jungles: Dry Tropical American Forest
programme.desc: In some regions of Central and South America, a forest adapted to drought combined with intermittent humidity survives.

programme.title: From Sardinia to Abruzzo
programme.desc: For many people, Sardinia is THE Mediterranean dream island: clichés like crystal-clear water and picturesque coastlines are reality here. Wild horses inhabit the vast unpopulated plateaux of Gesturi. In the adjacent high regions lies the kingdom of the imposing Mouflon. The curved horns of the male come in handy when battling over the females during rutting season. A breathtaking underwater world is hidden beneath the crystal clear water surrounding the island. Colourful fish, corals and sea snails live down here - as well as the basking shark! He can grow up to ten metres long, but he's completely harmless: with his huge mouth he only fishes microorganisms from the water. Sicily, off the coast at the tip of Italy's ‘boot', is the largest island in the Mediterranean. The island's most famous landmark is already visible from far-off: Etna, at 3340 metres the highest active volcano in Europe. Only 40 kilometres away another volcano looms high: Stromboli, which lies in the middle of the sea. It spews lava and fire at virtually minute intervals. From ancient times on, humans have feared the volcanoes of south Italy. Even today, there are 2500 year-old temple grounds still standing on Sicily. These days nature is re-claiming the age-old buildings – Mason bees and lizards inhabit the cracks and crevices, while lush flower meadows surround the ancient pillars. Abruzzo, lying level with Rome, is the wild heart of southern Italy. The rugged, uninhabited mountain world with its unspoilt beech forests make Abruzzo something special: this is Italy from its unfamiliar side! The inaccessible slopes are the territory of the extremely rare Apennine chamois. During rutting, the bucks engage in breakneck chases among the rocks.

programme.title: Wild Nairobi
programme.desc: With a population of around 3 million, Nairobi is one of the largest cities in Africa. However this metropolis is surrounded by wilderness that extends into the city itself.

programme.title: Garden of the Gods: Mediterranean Pine Forest
programme.desc: The coastal regions of the Old Continent are occupied by an evergreen forest that reach to the very edge of the sea.

programme.title: Venezuela: The Treasure of El Dorado
programme.desc: Venezuela is famous for its lost worlds, its forbidding mountains, huge swamps, and impenetrable jungles, all seemingly cut off in space and time. Yet each is linked, by the mighty river: the Orinoco, the rumoured route to El Dorado, city of gold.

programme.title: Two Worlds
programme.desc: A dramatic and poignant portrayal of the fragile alliances and desperate strategies for survival adopted by three species of animals caught in the no-man's-land where the human and natural worlds collide.

programme.title: Modern Migrations
programme.desc: When the animal you need to capture has a very long neck and standing almost 5 meters high, and able to spot you a mile away, you need to adapt your strategy dramatically.

programme.title: Good Morning, Sunshine!
programme.desc: This show teaches kids valuable habits through songs, guiding them through morning routines like waking up, brushing teeth, eating breakfast, and heading to kindergarten. It's a delightful blend of learning and fun!

programme.title: Jump for Joy
programme.desc: This show helps kids develop motor skills with fun morning exercise songs, boosting health and happiness. The lively lyrics inspire kids and parents to stay active, making mornings a joyful and healthy start for the whole family!

programme.title: SeriesABC -123!
programme.desc: This show makes learning the alphabet and numbers a fun adventure with stories, songs, and games. It inspires curiosity and joy, offering kids an engaging and delightful educational experience that keeps them entertained while they learn and grow.

programme.title: Music Box
programme.desc: This show presents songs for special events like Children's Day, Mother's Day, and seasonal milestones. Each song is thoughtfully crafted to match the time of year, introducing children to major celebrations in a fun, engaging, and memorable way.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies and some children learn about the colour blue. In Teletubbyland Po is watching the blue sky when it begins to rain.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Noo-Noo tidies up Home hill before the Teletubbies slide up the slide to watch Natalie tell us about her brother's christening.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Sarah and Mark give their sheep a winter-feed. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies cannot decide whether to have Tubby Custard or Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep, but Noo-Noo tidies up their blankets. They stop chasing him to watch some children learn about the number five. A flashing light appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies 'Christmas is a Coming'. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making Christmas cards. Laa-Laa's present is some lovely decorations. When Noo-Noo tidies them up they tickle his throat, so he throws them out to decorate Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Two children are making Christmas crackers for each other. Dipsy is very pleased to find his present is a cracker. He looks for someone to pull the cracker. It makes a lovely pink bang and the Teletubbies laugh when they fall over.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po's present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow. All the Teletubbies laugh as they play in the snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies see some children visit a level crossing and watch a train pass by. The Teletubbies play their Ready, Steady, Go game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies play a slide game before watching Becky and Jed look for eggs on their farm. Then their mum cooks them for their tea. In Teletubbyland, the Lion and Bear play their hide and seek game.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Alex Pascall and some children sing to their dolls to rock them to sleep. Laa-Laa wants to sing a lovely song, but Tinky Winky is crunching his Tubby Toast too loudly!

programme.title: Paw Patrol: Pup Tales
programme.desc: PAW Patrol follows a pack of heroic pups who protect Adventure Bay.

programme.title: Sing & Dance with CoComelon
programme.desc: Sing and dance with JJ and family, with much-loved nursery rhymes and other fun songs.

programme.title: Morphle
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Mila and her shapeshifting pet Morphle as they rescue the community of Petport.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and Orange are dangling their legs in the stream when something tickles Orange's foot. She is sent squealing from the water, certain an eel is after her. Strawberry good-naturedly chuckles at her antics. But Orange gets her dander up and wades into the water to face her "attacker." When she looks down into the water, gazing up at her is the cutest, most adorable, puffy-cheeked fish she's ever seen. It's love at first sight. Orange has to take him home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the next Storytime, Strawberry is going to read a new poem. We see her at the podium as she finishes writing it, one afternoon when no one else is in the café except Custard and Pupcake. Strawberry clears her throat and reads the poem aloud. It's a simple, sweet rhyme about the magic of making wishes on falling stars. She tries a few different rhymes as she goes, noting them on her paper. She is startled to hear applause from Mr. Longface Caterpillar who has heard her recital.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's friends watch her with wide eyes as she everrrrr-so-gently squirts a layer of blueberry smoothie into a tall glass, trying to not disturb the five other multi-colored layers beneath it. It's her tenth attempt to create the world's first Rainbow Smoothie! She has even painted one wall of her café rainbow colors in honor of the soon-to-be new item on the menu. No one dares breathe for fear of spoiling the delicate touch of a master smoothie-squirter at work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's a busy day at Lemon's salon, a charming place that is more than just a hair salon it's one of favorite places for Strawberry and her friends to relax and socialize. All the girls are getting their hair done for the gala grand opening of Mr. Longface's new lawn-bowling and croquet club. They're spirited and laughing and chatting and having a great time, as Lemon runs from one of her friends to the next, doing hair and nails, serving tea and cookies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Best You Can Bee
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While at Orange's general store to pick up a package, Berrykin Bloom chats with Orange about the pogostick he gave her to help her reach the upper shelves. She is very appreciative. He ends up getting a package of special berry seeds he ordered, not the vacation magazine Orange thought he came for. He explains how the seeds were a better purchase because of all the benefits to the Berryworks but now he can no longer afford a vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: Nothing To Fear But Berries Themselves
programme.desc: Overhearing Blueberry reading a story to the baby Berrykins about the scary Galumphalot, Orange is uncharacteristically shaken. She determines she doesn't want anything scary around her, just relaxation. But while the girls are having a hair-styling party at Lemon's salon, a malfunction at the BerryWorks causes the whole town to go dark. And Orange begins to get really anxious.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: Where, Oh, Where Has Our Blueberry Gone?
programme.desc: Blueberry has become obsessed with the mystery book detective heroine, Patti Persimmon. She decorates her store with Patti posters and rearranges her shelves to make room for all the Patti books she's ordered. Blueberry begins to neglect outings with her friends and even goes so far as to dress like her idol just to emulate her. She then starts looking for cases to solve around town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While in the midst of a cake decorating demonstration at the café, the girls are uncharacteristically interrupted by an excited Princess Berrykin. She announces the Berrykins have decided to revive the old tradition of the Berry Bitty Buggy Derby. While the girls enthusiastically recount the stories they've heard about it and ask the Princess questions, Blueberry, carrying enough books to block her view, comes through the door and unknowingly interrupts the Princess.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.

programme.title: The Might And The Magic
programme.desc: Aaron races across the kingdom to gather the NEXO-Knights as Jestro and his Destructive Monsters attack the King's Castle. The Knights must get back to the capitol in time, or Jestro will rule the kingdom! Jestro, while still attacking the King's Castle, has second thoughts until the Book of Monsters orders the mad jester to feed him another magic book he's found (and has been saving.) It's the powerful “Book of Revenge!” Now, combining the powers of Revenge and Destruction, Jestro and his monsters will get their vengeance on King Halbert and the Kingdom of Knighton. Jestro and his monsters lay siege…will they destroy the castle?! Meanwhile, Aaron races across the Kingdom gathering the NEXO-Knights one at a time. As each Knight rejoins the group, they become a more and more powerful team. They even get Robin to join them as the Black Knight in his repaired power suit. Our Knights arrive, finally regrouped, fight off Jestro, save the castle and the King. It's a glorious victory! The King is so pleased after seeing how the brave NEXO-Knights saved his kingdom, he allows Macy to join them as an official NEXO-Knight.

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When the NEXO-Knights are sloppy in a fight with Jestro, Merlok 2.0 sends them back to the Knights' Academy. Not only for a brush-up but to find out what Jestro is after in its hallowed halls. As they Knights battle Jestro – in a somewhat haphazard and lazy way – they discuss the fact that Jestro never wins and that they're always getting over on him. Despite defeating the jerky Jester and his evil Book, Merlok 2.0 discovers that something about the attack on the village is tied to the Knights' Academy. It looks like that's where they'll strike next. It wouldn't hurt for the Knights to go “back to school” to watch for Jestro and for some refresher training. Merlok is sure Jestro wants something at the Academy, but he doesn't know what it is. The Knights are very much “fish out of water” at the academy, even with the “cool kids” – Robin and Ava – showing them around. The next generation of Knights is being taught to integrate the NEXO-Magic of Merlok into their fighting techniques and these kids are good (so good, they initially kick the lazy, know-it-all Knight's butts!) Their old principal, the ever-ornery Headmaster Brickland, sets them straight: they're all still slackers, and they better get their acts together (especially Lance!) The Knights take shifts as “library helpers” much to the delight of the old squirebot librarian, MARGE. They're convinced Jestro is after a book…isn't he always after a book? When Jestro attacks, the Knights help organize the students and there's a big fight in the Academy Library versus Jestro and his Monsters. They drive Jestro off without letting him steal any books! Victory! But as Jestro leaves, we see him holding what the Book of Monsters really wanted: a snow globe with a castle in it that was sitting on the librarian's desk. In the Lava Lands, Jestro throws the snow globe into a volcano and it frees the massive Castle of Monstrux from its snowy magic prison

programme.title: Greed Is Good?
programme.desc: When Jestro uses the Book of Greed to rob Auremville of its riches, he also gets Lance's parents as prisoners and these demanding rich folks are too much for even monsters to handle. Jestro's not sure what to do with his new castle in the Lava Lands. “Every castle needs a big chamber filled with treasure” says the Book of Monsters so they've got to go out looting! The BOM convinces Jestro to call forth GENERAL MAGMAR, and Jestro appoints him as “general manager” of “castle operations,” much to Magmar's dismay. Meanwhile, Jestro and the BOM find the BOOK OF GREED. This will allow them to make greedy, rapacious monsters that will bring them all the treasure they want to fill their castle! They'll head to the richest town in the realm – AUREMVILLE! Meanwhile, in Auremville, the NEXO-Knights arrive for a huge “Gold is Good” ball at Lance's house. When the Monsters finally arrive in Auremville, a battle breaks out and the greedy monsters make off with everything…including Lance's parents, Goldie and Cuthbert Richmond who are clad in the finest golden garments and so look valuable! Lance will now be forced to live…poor. The Knights have to get his parents back. Meanwhile, his parents – Cuthbert and Goldie Richmond –think their imprisonment in Jestro's gold-filled castle is a “spa holiday” with the worst service. They order Magmar and the monsters around like servants and drive them all crazy. The Knights pile into the Fortrex and head for the Lava Lands, formulating a plan along the way to free Lance's parents. In a village half-way to Jestro's Castle, the Knights run into…Jestro and his monsters headed the other way with Lance's parents and all the gold they've stolen. There's a big fight, until they realize they might have the same goal and decide to deal. The BOM wants to give them back all the gold and Lance's parents. Lance says “No deal.” “We'll take the gold, you can keep my parents.” It's a weird and comical stand-off. Finally, Clay convinces Lance he has to take his parents back even if they don't always get along (and, it's the only way to get the gold back.)

programme.title: Peak Performance
programme.desc: The search for the Sandman leads Mateo and the others to the tallest mountain in the Dream World, but Lunia's hourglass puts a target on their backs.

programme.title: The Anomaly
programme.desc: A surprise visit from the Chief Inspector of the Night Bureau forces Mateo to hide Z-Blob, who goes on an adventure in the heart of Brooklyn.

programme.title: The Digiverse And Beyond, The Elemental Masters
programme.desc: Tackling a puzzle about technology in Ninjago. A riddle requires the Ninja to consider the powers and history of the Elemental Masters.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Andrea's Big Moment
programme.desc: When famous pop star Livi comes to Heartlake City to judge a talent show, our five friends Olivia, Mia, Andrea, Emma and Stephanie all decide to enter – and one of them, in particular, really wants to win but faces some serious challenge from an old rival. A talent show has come to Heartlake City and all the girls enter the talent competition hoping to impress the judges, especially their idol, pop star Chloe. No one wants a shot at stardom more than Andrea, which is why the other girls are surprised when she doesn't show up to practice before the first round of the competition. Very nearly eliminated prior to the big show, Andrea panics and throws herself into an intense practice-training mode, even shutting her friends out when they're trying to help her with her performance. Just moments before her live TV debut, Andrea realizes she's missing a key element to her act. Can she pull it off without her friends? And are the other girls willing to help after being pushed away?

programme.title: Kate's Island
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip, they meet the stand-offish Kate – but they soon realize that there's more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn't judge the book by its cover. No one is more excited than Olivia about science camp at a beautiful rocky offshore island with a lighthouse. But Olivia quickly gets off on the wrong foot with a mysterious girl named Kate who seems obsessed with a medallion necklace and the island's rumored history of pirates and treasure. Even worse for Olivia, Kate seems to be growing extra chummy with Mia, even sneaking around the island with her late at night. With the help of Stephanie, Emma and Andrea, Olivia is determined to get to the bottom of the girls' secret friendship and find out once and for all what they're searching for on the island, but they better not let Mrs. Stevens catch them out of their cabin past curfew.

programme.title: The Grand Hotel
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea's family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly. The girls are ready to do everything to make a great impression – but things don't quite go according to plan. Andrea, Stephanie, Olivia, Emma and Mia have come for breakfast at the fanciest hotel in town, now owned by Andrea's family. When Andrea's aunt has to leave town, the girls volunteer to run the hotel for the weekend with the help of quirky Grandma Jean. This is the perfect job for Stephanie's expert managerial skills but then the hotel suddenly fills to capacity with guests, including a hotel critic that can make or break the hotel's reputation! Now the girls find themselves in over their heads juggling reception, childcare, food prep and waitressing, a dog-walking service and a testy chef who quits on them in the middle of dinner. Unfortunately, much of this is their own fault. Can the girls save the Grand Hotel from themselves?

programme.title: Ninjaball Run
programme.desc: When the ninja learn that Darreth's Mojo Dojo is to be destroyed and Darreth doesn't have the money to save it, our heroes enter the annual NinjaBall Run to win its cash prize in order to save the dojo. As Lloyd continues to train and unlock his hidden powers, the Ninja learn land developers are going to destroy Darreth's Mojo Dojo unless Darreth can find the money to save it. The Ninja decide to enter their Ninja Tank into the annual NinjaBall Run cross-country rally to try to win its cash prize. Revisiting past characters who also enter the race, the high-speed derby will only grow more dangerous as Garmadon enters his Black Bounty, realizing this is the perfect chance to use his Mega-Weapon and rid the ninja. In the end, the Ninja will discover a few secrets within their Ninja Tank, allowing them to beat Garmadon's Bounty by a millisecond and saving Darreth's Dojo with their well-deserved cash prize. And as a final surprise, the Ninja steal back the Destiny's Bounty and make it their own once again.

programme.title: Child's Play
programme.desc: When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and turned into kids and are now forced to enlist Lloyd's help to battle the awakened monster. Tired of intense training, Lloyd yearns to play and enjoy his youth. The Ninja remind Lloyd that along with great power, comes great responsibility. When the Ninja interrupt Lord Garmadon from using his Mega-Weapon to ‘turn back the clock' and bring to life the fossils of a monster, the Ninja are accidentally hit and soon discover they've been turned into kids! Seeking Lloyd's help and relying on childhood antics, the five ninja kids must destroy the reawakened monster that's hunting them in the city. In the end, Lloyd makes the difficult decision and sacrifices his youth in order to save them from the beast, turning forward the clock and turning Lloyd into a young man. Sensei Wu fears now that since Lloyd is young man, the final battle of good versus evil approaches sooner than he had ever expected.

programme.title: The Surge
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd. Nowhere is safe but fortunately, the Ninja have been given the powerful Techno Blades. But the only problem is that they have no idea how to use them. Time has passed since the Ultimate Battle, and while the Golden Ninja continues to watch over Ninjago, the other Ninja have become complacent as schoolteachers. When a mysterious invitation from genius Cyrus Borg brings them to the futuristic New Ninjago City, trouble surges when a digital virus of the Overlord takes over technology. The Golden Ninja makes a heroic entrance, only to find out his Golden Power supercharges the enemy. Sensei Wu stays behind so that the Ninja can escape with the only thing that can save Ninjago's future – Borg's Techno Weapons.

programme.title: The Art Of The Silent Fist
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord's evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go. Their only chance is to learn the secrets of the Techno blades and use them to cut all power to save Ninjao from this technological menace. The Ninja hide out at a safe place void of technology – Sensei Garmadon's Sanctuary. That night, Zane is visited by Borg's female robo-assistant, Pixal. She warns them that the Digital Overlord is after Lloyd's Golden Power in order to become flesh, but the Techno Blades can reboot the system and erase him for good. After a highly advanced army of Nindroids attacks the Sanctuary, Lloyd flees with his father into the wilderness of Ninjago, while the rest set off on a quest to turn off all power in Ninjago, so that they can erase the Digital Overlord once and for all.

programme.title: The Book Of Total Badness
programme.desc: The NEXO-Knights must fight Jestro's Monsters of Destruction which are attacking all over the Kingdom. But Merlok smells a trap…is he right? In a dark, destroyed part of the kingdom, Jestro arrives at the ruins of a HUGE castle. The Book of Monsters knows this place: the great evil wizard Monstrux lived here. The Book sniffs out some powerful magic in the ruins: “The Book of Destruction.” With this, The Book tells Jestro they can destroy the NEXO-Knights and then attack the King's Castle and cause massive destruction. Jestro creates destructive monsters and sends them all over the realm, so the Knights must separate and fight single combats all over the place. The Knights lose these battles (lesson: they have to work as a team!) And, just when the Knights are scattered across the Kingdom, Jestro attacks the King's Castle! It looks like all is lost. When Aaron, who has escaped, returns to see Jestro's attack, he realizes he must gather his fellow Knights. Merlok says it's very dangerous, but Aaron says he must take the risk to gather the Knights and save Knighton.
