programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Peewit's Unscrupulous Adventure: Peewit, the court jester, is the Smurfs' human friend. There is to be a celebration at the King's castle and Peewit good-humouredly invites his little blue friends to the feast. But they learn that the wicked chamberlain is pilfering the King's possessions.

programme.title: The Smurfiest Of Friends
programme.desc: Brainy Smurf had one friend: Clumsy Smurf. But poor Clumsy is so, well, clumsy, that Brainy refuses to see him again. So now he is left without anyone willing to listen to him. Maybe Buddy, the good-looking imp met by chance near the Great Oak can be a pal for Brainy....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Poltersmurf: There are few things Grandpa Smurf enjoys more than telling a good scary story, and there are few Smurfs who don't love to listen. But things get a little too much for Brainy Smurf when Grandpa tells of Poltersmurfs, and Poltersmurfs begin harrowing Brainy...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Greedy And The Porridge Pot: The good fairy, Guinilda gives Greedy a magic porridge pot that Brainy causes to overflow into the village and forest. The good-hearted fairy hurries to the rescue and then asks for the pot back to give to an orphanage of hungry children.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Most Unsmurfy Games: To prove the worth of his Big Book of Wilderness Survival, Brainy takes the Smurflings to the swamp. Where, thanks to his expert advice, the tiny group gets totally lost, is then caught in quicklime and trapped by King Bullrush of the Wartmongers. Fortunately, Bullrush is in a playful mood and devises a Smurf hunt. Unfortunately, Brainy believes he is a born leader...

programme.title: Smurf Box Derby
programme.desc: Handy Smurf makes another invention: the Smurfmobile. Each Smurf has his – or her – customized vehicle and all, or almost all, the Smurfs enjoy a little spin... But then the evil wizard Gargamel gets hold of the idea and starts making trouble for the Smurfs...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Noble Stag: His wicked cousin, Malcolm the Mean, who plans to kill him and mount him in his trophy room, has turned King Gerard into a black stag. The little Smurfs help their friend. When King Gerard is transformed back into his human form, Malcolm becomes imprisoned in the body of the stag.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Curried Smurfs: In Ancient India, the unscrupulous fakir Gargapuri sells the Smurfs to the Rajah for his private zoo. Only Grandpa, Wild Smurf and Jokey are free, so it's up to them to sneak into the palace and rescue their friends. Along the way they free all the caged animals in the Raja's menagerie.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Hopping Cough Smurfs: The evil wizard Gargamel spreads the forest with the germs of the uncontrollable hopping cough. Baby Smurf is the first victim and all the Village of the Smurfs goes frantic with worry... Fortunately, Papa Smurf thinks there might be a cure.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Sorcerer Smurf: Gargamel creates the legend of Sorcerer Smurf to lure Papa Smurf and his smurfy friends into a trap at his mountain hideaway. Papa Smurf outwits the wicked wizard with some of his own magic and Gargamel is chased down the mountain and back to his castle.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: Beauty Is Only Smurf Deep
programme.desc: Periwinkle, a vain Pixie, is upset when her magic mirror tells her that Vanity is the fairest, not she. Periwinkle kidnaps Vanity, but the rest of the Smurfs come to Vanity's rescue. Periwinkle sees the error of her ways and they become friends.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Never Smurf Off Till Tomorrow: A fierce wind carries the Smurfs' windmill away, with several Smurfs inside. Is Lazy Smurf really at fault or is an injustice being committed? Are the captive Smurfs going to be saved from the volcano's crater? Is Brainy going to smurf up his mouth for a moment?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Soothsayer Smurfette: When Smurfette meets this gentle old gypsy woman in the forest and receives a swirling multicoloured dress, she's delighted. How could she know that this woman is really the evil wizard Gargamel in disguise, and that there is a terrible spell on the beautiful dress?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Lost City Of Yore: Curiosity brings Nosey Smurf to the lair of the Hag Sisters, who want to find the terrifying Sceptre of Yore... And Gargamel wants to cheat the two witches as he tries to destroy the Smurfs.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurf Who Would Be King: Dreamy yearns to be King after reading a story about them. He falls through a whirlpool while on his ship and finds himself in the land of pokies who think Dreamy is their long-lost King. When he confronts the pokies' enemies, the Norfnags, he finds they aren't fearful at all. Dreamy bumps his head and wakes up to discover it was just a dream, yet finds a jewel in his cap, just like the ones the pokies mine for a living.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - April Smurf's Day: April Smurf's Day turns out to be not so funny when Gargamel dons a smurfberry bush disguise to capture the happy little Smurfs. Papa Smurf instructs Feathers to call the birds to attack the fake bush. After it is stripped, the captured Smurfs climb aboard Feathers and fly away.

programme.title: The Whole Smurf And Nothing But The Smurf
programme.desc: The evil wizard Gargamel is able to capture the Smurfette. Now he is going to give her a truth serum and know all of Papa Smurf' secrets… But then Gargamel makes a big mistake and gives the Smurfette a fib formula!

programme.title: Master Scruple
programme.desc: Farmer Smurf is the reluctant master of a genie named Gourdy, whose enthusiasm for service is somewhat excessive. After yet another incident due to Gourdy's overzealousness, Farmer Smurf says something he shouldn't and Gourdy disappears. And guess who finds him? Well, it's Scruple, apprentice to the evil wizard Gargamel. And who should steal Gourdy from Scruple, if not Gargamel himself?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Jungle Jitterbug: The rain forest of South America is not a place where Vanity Smurf would like to spend his life. And then he starts dancing madly when he gets jungle fever. His dance will have strange results.

programme.title: Bwah‑BFFs
programme.desc: Friendships form, break and explode in classic Rabbid emotional chaos.

programme.title: Critter Chaos & Creature Capers
programme.desc: Creatures big and small spark wild Rabbid antics in a lively mix of pets, farm life and animal mayhem.

programme.title: S2 Creature Bwah‑niverse
programme.desc: Feathers, claws and critter chaos as Rabbids meet wild new friends.

programme.title: S3 Creature Chaos 2.0
programme.desc: Beasts, bugs and bizarre critters spark nonstop Rabbid mayhem.

programme.title: Springtime Scramble & Egg‑Capers
programme.desc: The Rabbids hunt for Easter eggs with spectacularly ridiculous and messy results.

programme.title: S3 Dream Bwah‑ventures 2.0
programme.desc: Nightmares and dreamworld nonsense send Rabbids into surreal trouble.

programme.title: S3 Creature Chaos 2.0
programme.desc: Beasts, bugs and bizarre critters spark nonstop Rabbid mayhem.

programme.title: The Very Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Masha loves fairy tales and of course she believes that each fairy tale should lead to happy end, even if nothing contributes to it! That's how the story goes… The Bear still hopes to win the heart of the female Bear. He finds an ancient gondola at the bottom of the forest lake. The Bear decides to restore it and invites the female Bear for a romantic ride! No one would have expected that this story would perfectly match Masha's new hobby - puppet theatre.

programme.title: Time To Ride My Pony
programme.desc: The Bear's good friend, the Tiger, is back for a visit and they decide to spend the time together in an intellectual way – playing chess. Masha is immediately drawn into the game and to everyone's surprise, she outsmarts and outplays both the Bear and his friend with just one chess figure.

programme.title: The Grand Piano Lesson
programme.desc: The bear finds a beautiful black piano in the forest. He happily takes it home, fixes and tunes it and begins to play some music. Masha couldn't help staying away from this lovely instrument. She decides to become a world famous pianist, she asks the Bear to teach her how to play the piano.

programme.title: Arts and Crafts Day
programme.desc: Masha announces Arts and Crafts Day. Get your glue, pencils and any unnecessary things and let's create! The Bear is trying to sneak away on a fishing trip. But what will he catch if all his floats are gone for crafts? Is it Masha, to put her in a corner? Well, not this time. Friendship always wins in our creative contests!

programme.title: The Foundling
programme.desc: Occasionally Masha finds an egg, from which a penguin hatches. The Bear has to take double care now. He cooks special dishes and builds mini aqua park for little penguin and Masha. Finally the Bear figures out that the penguin will be happy only in suitable weather conditions and send the penguin Antarctica on a little plane.

programme.title: See You Later
programme.desc: This day will change Bear's life forever. To everyone's surprise, Masha has suddenly grown up, getting all the forest dwellers shocked by her exceptionally good behavior. Her sister Dasha is going to take her back to the big city, which really upsets the Bear and others.

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: We Come In Peace!
programme.desc: In the courtyard of the Bear's house a spaceship makes an emergency landing. The aliens need to urgently replenish their supplies and return home. Only on the ground everything is arranged differently than at home. Masha and Mishka will help them to understand what's what, fix the ship and go back to home.

programme.title: Scary Story About Spooky Stories
programme.desc: Are you sure that you really like spooky stories? What if this kind of story will get you really thrilled? Listen to one classic story and don't say that you are not shocked after all!

programme.title: Soul Freezing Tale Of Grim Forest And Tiny Timid Bug
programme.desc: All children are afraid of the dark. Masha was afraid of it too and had to sit with a torch all night long! But once upon a time she came up with the tale about a tiny bug, which lived in the woods and was so afraid of the dark, that every rustle made its heart tremble! The bug suffered a lot until he realized that all tiny things you see in the dark just seem to be frightful and fear makes no sense at all!

programme.title: Terrible Truth About Those Who Are Afraid To Be Little
programme.desc: Everyone think that it's so scary to be little as there are so many things are not accessible for you! But in reality there is no difference how little you are if there is someone who cares for you and someone you care about…

programme.title: Gloomy Story About The Darkest Dreams
programme.desc: All children are keen on computer games! Everyone likes to shoot a couple of monsters before going to sleep. Tolik also liked to play shooters until the monsters attack him in reality in order to commit the revenge! Or…was it just a dream? Let's see...

programme.title: Sinister Saga Of A Sick Tummy And A Girl Who Was Afraid Of Doctors
programme.desc: Masha narrates a terrific story about one little girl who was afraid of doctors. And once upon a time she experienced one fantastic story…she decided to cook dinner for her dolls. She took some clay and made “meat balls” with “semolina porridge”. As the meal seemed tasty, Sima decided to eat a bit of her dinner too… And so she lies in her bad and feels a horrible stomachache. Nobody knows how long she would need to suffer, but when she woke up…she realized herself in hospital…near the real snow queen… who explained that medical treatment is not scary at all…though some other things are very fearsome! Oh yeah!

programme.title: Bloodcurdling Saga About Joyful Event
programme.desc: Everyone think that it's so scary to be little as there are so many things are not accessible for you! But in reality there is no difference how little you are if there is someone who cares for you and someone you care about…

programme.title: Grim Parable About Superstitious Girl
programme.desc: Some people happen to believe in all sorts of omens like black cats, wearing clothes inside out, prophetic dreams… Poor girl Lucy believed in that kind of stuff so much that was even afraid to go outside to play with her friends. And how could you go out if you were born in the year of Purple rabbit that promises…no matter what… You'll see…

programme.title: Terrifying True Story About Monsters And Those Who Fear Them
programme.desc: Are you afraid of monsters? Sure you are! Let me tell you a scary story about a boy who experienced a real fear…This story happened on an abandoned tractor factory. The boy lost a scoop from his toy-tractor and decided to look for it at the factory. So he goes up the stairs and sees a large female monster, who was about to paint her lips with a roller! As he kept walking he noticed more monsters playing domino! The boy was very terrified and about to cry, when he learnt that it was just a movie set and all the monsters were not real! They were just actors…Finally the boy realized that all the monsters from the books and movies are not real at all! But if want to see a real monster- watch a fly under a microscope!

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Seven Young Kids
programme.desc: This educative tale teaches us that caution should never be dismissed. Mother-Goat goes to pick up cabbage, leaving her seven kids alone at home. Hungry Wolf tries to get into the house imitating mother Goat's voice to fool the little yeanlings. He manages to deceive six kids, but the seventh, the smallest one, manages to hide in the oven. The Wolf tries to get into the house through the chimney, but here comes Mother-Goat and finds her seventh kid. She melts the stove, and the Wolf rushes into the forest with his tail burnt. The other six kids come back home and finally the family reunites.

programme.title: The Fox and the Rolling Pin
programme.desc: This is the story about the Fox, the Cat and the Rooster. The sneaky Fox wanted to fool the Cat in order to eat the Rooster and get a rolling-pin. No matter how the Fox tried to butter up the Cat, he denied hand over the Rooster to the Fox. To teach her a lesson, the Cat got into a bag himself and when the Fox opened it in order to eat the Rooster, the Cat jumped out of it and frightened her. The point of the story is that “if you are well off you don't seek better”.

programme.title: Go I Know Not Whither
programme.desc: One day he wished to taste an exotic fowl and sent Yegor the huntsman to the deep forest. In the forest, Yegor met a starling, which turned into a beautiful girl. The Tsar saw Yegor to have successfully completed his task and also got the beautiful wife. He started to envy Yegor. The Tsar decided to send Yegor over distant seas to bring do not know what. Despite Tsar's insidious plan, Yegor has successfully returned back home and even taught the king an important lesson not to envy other people.Once upon a time there was a king. He was very cranky and foolish.

programme.title: The Frog Princess
programme.desc: There lived a Tsar with his three sons. The oldest son married on nobleman's daughter, the second one married the merchant's daughter, while the youngest son - on the Frog. She was not pretty, but happened to be the Frog Princess who turned into a beautiful girl. This story teaches us to take care of your pets. This is the only way they could appeal to your concerns and become your faithful friends.

programme.title: Liar, Liar, Pants On Fire
programme.desc: Kids love daydreaming and show off their imaginary successes, aren't they?! Masha and Panda grip into a real cheating competition! This would be very funny story If only all the secrets were not revealed all at the most inopportune time!

programme.title: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard, but yet he has no idea that soon he would have to pull Masha from a puddle and a jar of jam. But it's not all- now the Bear has to sew new dresses eve-ry time when Masha will get wet or dirty.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: La Dolce Vita
programme.desc: Masha wants some sweets but first she has to transform the Bear's kitchen into a candy-making factory. As we all know, such sweet life means trouble and soon Masha gets a toothache. There is a lesson for all children who love sweets - take very good care of your teeth!

programme.title: Princess or Dragon?
programme.desc: A snow tower? Check. A group of friends? Check. Sound like a recipe for a fun game! Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie and Penguin – what wouldn't you do for the sake of the children! But who will be the Princess? And who will be the Dragon? And the knight and his brave steed? Masha has her own opinion on these questions…

programme.title: Well-beeing
programme.desc: What happens when bees overeat chocolates? Masha becomes their personal trainer! Get ready! Let's start weight loss exercises!

programme.title: How to Train Your Plant
programme.desc: She-Bear is going to a resort and leaves Bear with her “pet” – a flycatcher. The modest flower suddenly shows an excellent appetite. Masha, of course, knows better than anyone how to treat the flycatcher. She-Bear will be surprised when she returns to the forest and sees what came out of such a “feeding”!

programme.title: Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: The Bear plays checkers. Masha interrupts him asking to feed her. The Bear cooks some porridge for her. But Masha doesn't like it. The Bear goes off in a huff. Masha decides to cook porridge her-self. But soon the porridge swells out. All the for-est inhabitants will remember this day for long…

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: The Mystery Guest
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there! Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help the baby, and, of course, Masha tags along with him. Although if we are to face danger, then we must do so together!

programme.title: Quartet Plus
programme.desc: To play in a quartet is not so easy as it seems, especially if there is no slack between musicians. This is what Masha tells Papa Bear, who came to visit. And he will tell about Bear's childhood and how he was mischievous with the Himalayan bear. Has anything changed since then? We will learn it from the new episode. And most importantly, music will unite everyone!

programme.title: Swept Away
programme.desc: Masha and the Hare are having an epic game of hockey. When the game is at its peak, Masha goes off to find the missing puck and stumbles upon a broom. Now this is much better than a hockey stick and Masha gets an idea. But it turns out the broom can be used for things other than hockey.

programme.title: When Life Gives You Lemons
programme.desc: The Bear has a plan to save the sweltering She-Bear> He's planned a date and made refreshing homemade lemonade from his own grown lemons. But as usual, Masha bursts into the plan. Treat the whole forest with lemonade - that's the best idea! Quiet date - that's not great! Hello lemonade fever!

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: Arts and Crafts Day
programme.desc: Masha announces Arts and Crafts Day. Get your glue, pencils and any unnecessary things and let's create! The Bear is trying to sneak away on a fishing trip. But what will he catch if all his floats are gone for crafts? Is it Masha, to put her in a corner? Well, not this time. Friendship always wins in our creative contests!

programme.title: Tee For Three
programme.desc: How difficult it is to remain calm when two little tombs are raging in the house. Panda and Masha are fooling around for days. To cope with stress, Bear needs a good rest. Will he be able to restore internal forces or two fidgets will not give him peace?

programme.title: Grim Testament About One Snotty Boy
programme.desc: Have you ever heard that the world around is full terrible plagues and diseases? One boy called Semushka knows it for sure! Wherever he threw a glance – he seemed to see tetanus, rubella and other kinds of chickenpoxes…The poor boy was so terrified that began to squish his nose even harder. The only saving measures was an aid kit which his grandmother has put in his backpack “just in case” and a little spacesuit…Basically…this grim “testament” about such a snotty boy came out to be the most educative one!

programme.title: A Myth Full Of Grief And Despair About One Historical Error
programme.desc: Here is a boy called Arkasha who really doesn't like history lessons. The most frightening thing for him was…a history test. He tried his best to prepare for the test, however he fell asleep. When he opened his eyes he saw all the range of historic characters chastising him for his illiteracy, and Napoleon was even ready to hit him on the head with a globe! Arkasha was so scared that vowed to learn all the names and dates, otherwise how could he protect himself from such nervous historic creatures?!Do you know what children are scared the most of at school? What makes them tremble?!

programme.title: Panic Unbearable Legend About Insects
programme.desc: Once there was a girl called Anya who was very scared of insects! One day Anya's mother asked her to help around the house but in everything she did, Anya was haunted by spiders and all kinds of midges! She was on the edge of despair when her little brother proved to her, that little crumbs can't be of any danger to giants like children!

programme.title: Like Cat And Mouse
programme.desc: Alert! Bear's fridge is in danger! Someone has burst into his house to stay for life…but the Bear is ready for everything to defend his stocks! He calls for a savior, but in reality it turns to be a new intriguing story full of unexpected discoveries which leads Masha to some peculiar conclusions!

programme.title: At Your Service
programme.desc: The technologies some time can teach us a human lesson like in this story about two robots. One of them was presented to Masha for her birthday and the other one was made by the Bear to help him around, but tried to become the boss. Everything turned into great mess and only an unexpectedly awakened feeling between two robots put everything in its place.

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: Bon Appétit
programme.desc: Panda- the Bear's distant relative pays one more visit to the Bear. They start making Chinese dump-lings, but then Masha appears, with her own methods of cooking. And a simple cooking turns into a culinary master class with butterflies!

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: Prances With Wolves
programme.desc: The Wolves that live in the forest come with a plan to kidnap Masha and demand the Bear to pay a ransom. However the Bear is pleased to find Masha gone and he does not rush the events. Meanwhile Masha turns the Wolves' lives into a hell and they end up paying the ransom to the Bear just to get rid of her once and for all.

programme.title: Around the world in one day
programme.desc: The Bear is preparing to go on a world trip, but a last minute accident makes him panic. In the meantime, Masha knows the best way to prepare for the trip and shares it with the Bear.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Tails adopts a cute and fuzzy pet named Walter who turns out to be a black hole who sucks up everything in Mobius. Realizing that Walter is from another dimension our heroes have to return him.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a giant AMNESIA RAY in his booby-trapped PINBALL FORTRESS (based on the Sonic game per Roger Hector) in order to erase the bad memories the Mobius citizens have of him, and make them think he's a great guy.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik invents a robot coach -- the "Coachnik", to put S and G through a "Training Camp" to improve their skills. Then Coachnik puts a bomb in Grounder's head as a booby trap for Sonic, and a football game ensues with Grounder's head as the ball.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails help out an Owl/Chilidog Diner owner, named Bert Whoo, when Robotnik uses his henchbots to try to collect protection money. When the henchbots prove to be no match for Sonic.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Coconuts inadvertantly creates a "super power" formula, when his janitor bucket spills in the lab. Robotnik falls into it and becomes "Super Robotnik", then challenges Sonic to a fight, with all of Mobius as the stakes. With Prof. Von...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When Robotnik puts a meteor on a collision course with a village, Sonic is forced to compete in the Robolympics to save the village. After a series of wild, booby trapped events, Sonic is victorious.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: When outlaws chase a sheriff out of a western town, Sonic takes over. But the outlaws are robots built by Robotnik. And when they capture a pretty possum of a saloon girl, Sonic meets Robotnik for a showdown.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: First in a four-part Time Travel series. Robotnik invents a time machine to go back in time and gather four powerful gemstones. His first attempt is on the high seas, but Sonic goes into hyper-Sonic-overdrive, and reverses time to go after him. ...

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog, Adventures of
programme.desc: Robotnik timetravels back to Mobigypt, makes himself a pharoah, and enslaves everbody in an effort to find the gemstone of immortality.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: The Freedom Fighters run into a Swashbuckler, named Ari, battling Swat-Bots. Sonic diverts them, allowing Ari to escape. After hearing that Robotnik is holding his band of Freedom Fighters hostage, Ari decides to help Sonic free them.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: On a mission to contact the first Freedom Fighters on the King's List, Sonic and the others are forced to travel through a tunnel which carries a "curse" against all intruders.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: After Antoine saves Sally's life during a raid, Sonic can't stand his bragging and zips in to see Uncle Chuck, who finds out his "bug" in Robotnik's HQ is malfunctioning.

programme.title: Dangerous Bestie
programme.desc: (2018) Tense thriller starring Rosslyn Luke. Happy to be reunited at first, a woman quickly realises her former best friend has sinister plans to hold her and her family hostage.

programme.title: Lars and the real girl
programme.desc: Extremely shy Lars strikes up an unconventional relationship with a doll he finds on the Internet. On the advice of a doctor, his family and neighbours go along with his delusion.

programme.title: A Single Man
programme.desc: Previously featured at the London Film Festival. A SINGLE MAN, tells the story of a British professor who dwells on the past and cannot see his future. We follow him through a single day, where a series of events leads him to decide if there is meaning to life after the death of his partner,Jim.

programme.title: Warrior
programme.desc: The youngest son (Hardy) of an alcoholic former boxer (Nolte) returns home, where he's trained by his father for competition in a mixed martial arts tournament -- a path that puts the fighter on a collision corner with his older brother (Edgerton).

programme.title: 4 Wedding Planners
programme.desc: After Lily rejects her boyfriend's marriage proposal, she returns home to Hawaii where she must help out with her mother's wedding planning business.

programme.title: Dance-Off
programme.desc: Two cross-town rival dance teams go head to head for the National Nationals Championship.

programme.title: Radio Rebel
programme.desc: Tara (Debby Ryan) - a painfully shy high-schooler, has a secret: she is also a confident DJ known as Radio Rebel, who lends her voice to others.

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and intrigue ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want to get their hands on a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. She soon loses trust in those who claim they want to help her.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Superhumans defy a government plot to harness and abuse their powers. Chris Evans and Dakota Fanning (the TWILIGHT films) team in a pulse-pounding paranormal thriller.

programme.title: Sky Kids
programme.desc: As a pair of schoolboys sneak a look around an empty private aircraft, two criminals take off with the kids still inside. Upon discovering the men are dangerous gangsters, the horrified lads inadvertently become embroiled in the mobsters's scheme.

programme.title: Bottle Shock
programme.desc: The story of the early days of California wine making featuring the now infamous, blind Paris wine tasting of 1976 that has come to be known as "Judgment of Paris". Feat: Chris Pine, Alan Rickman & Bill Pullman.

programme.title: Noah
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Noah in the timeless story of courage, sacrifice, and hope. This visually stunning, action-adventure is hailed as "one of the most unforgettable Biblical epics ever put on film." *Richard Roeper, Chicago-Sun-Times

programme.title: Cube Zero
programme.desc: A programmer whose job is to watch over the reality-warping Cube defies orders to rescue an innocent mother.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: As 15 Division recovers from the shooting of Callaghan, a series of arsons culminates in a laundromat fire.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Using a car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: When an informant is murdered, 15 Division sets its sights on finding a weak link in the East Jameson gang.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: When a woman is attacked in the same way as a deceased cop. Callaghan is convinced that it's the same suspect.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: For the Love of Benji
programme.desc: Benji is on holiday with his family in Greece, but after getting separated at the airport, he finds himself on another exciting adventure, now on the run from international spies!

programme.title: Benji
programme.desc: Benji makes his cinematic debut as the beloved dog who has captured the heart of the town. When his favourite friends are kidnapped, Benji sets out to track them down and save the day.

programme.title: 12 in a Box
programme.desc: 12 IN A BOX is the laugh-out-loud story of 12 former school friends who get together for a reunion they will never forget, where they are given the chance to win a life-changing 1million each. The only catch is, they cannot leave the estate for 96 hours, and anyone who enters the grounds must also stay for the duration! With time ticking away, the mismatched dozen are forced to work together to keep the peace and work toward their payday. But, when they have to deal with an untimely death, a kidnapping plot, another corpse, burglars, and then even a visit from the boys in blue, will this hapless clan be able to hold it together or will their dreams of riches be buried with the bodies? Staring Miranda Hart (Miranda, Call the Midwife) and Katy Wix (Not Going Out), this is classic British farce at its best.

programme.title: It's a Boy Girl Thing
programme.desc: It's A Boy Girl Thing is a brilliantly funny romantic comedy about next-door neighbours who live worlds apart. Woody Deane (Zegers) and Nell Bedworth (Armstrong) are life long sworn enemies who wake up one day to find themselves in a very strange place: each others bodies. In their switched identities, each sets out to destroy the other's high school reputation. When they start to succeed they get more than they bargained for. Sometimes falling in love can be an out of body experience.

programme.title: Pandorum
programme.desc: Two astronauts (Dennis Quaid, Vantage Point and Ben Foster, 30 Days of Night) awaken in a hyper-sleep chamber aboard a seemingly abandoned spacecraft. It's pitch black, they are disoriented, and the only sound is a low rumble and creak from the belly of the ship. They can't remember anything like who they are and what their mission is, but one thing they do realise very quickly is that they are not alone. Slowly the spacecraft's shocking, deadly secrets are revealed and the astronauts find that they must fight to stay alive and that their survival is more important than they could ever have imagined. Directed by Christian Alvart and also starring Cam Gigandet (Twilight), Cung Le (Tekken) and newcomer Antje Traue.

programme.title: Time Runners
programme.desc: Special Agent Sally Biggs has a secret, she can rewind time - whenever she wants. It's enough to make her a celebrity at the FBI and control almost everything in her life. But when her scientist husband disappears mysteriously, paranormal apparitions begin to surround her before she discovers the terrifying truth.

programme.title: The Ice Princess
programme.desc: For fans of Frozen this thrilling, ice-cool animated adventure is set to melt your hearts! When the brave fire dragon Tabaluga meets beautiful ice princess Lilli, they become instant friends. To save their world from a tyrannical snowman, they have to stick together and embark on an exciting journey. An inspiring tale all about the power of friendship and the victory of love over hate.

programme.title: All Dogs go to Heaven
programme.desc: A poignant, classic masterpiece animation from acclaimed filmmaker Don Bluth and featuring the voice of Burt Reynolds. A stunning family film about the canine criminal underworld as we follow furry outcast, Charlie, who comes back to earth from heaven and befriends a young orphan who can speak to animals. As their friendship blossoms Charlie learns that friendship is the most heavenly gift of all.

programme.title: Lez Bomb
programme.desc: Lez Bomb is a hilarious and sweet “coming out” comedy in the vein of Meet the Parents from Bobby Farrelly, producer of There's Something about Mary. Lauren, (Writer-Director Jenna Laurenzo) comes home with life changing news. As it turns out, there is no good time to drop the Lez Bomb.

programme.title: A Random Encounter
programme.desc: Starring the charming Meghan Markle (Suits), this whirlwind rom-com proves that finding Prince Charming can be a right royal pain. Sassy Mindy is well and truly immersed in the superficial dating scene, while her best friend Laura is a hopeless romantic. So when she has a chance moment with a stranger in a coffee shop, she is left wondering whether this could blossom into a lifelong romance?

programme.title: When Love Came to Town
programme.desc: Abby is a famous author whose latest stop on her book tour takes her to the town of Bliss. But little does she know that the locals are keen to play matchmaker for her. Lauren Holly stars. (2014)

programme.title: Love's Last Resort
programme.desc: A woman leaves her immature boyfriend, hoping he will grow up and beg her to come back. However, six months later, she finds out that he's engaged to someone else.

programme.title: Let Love Grow
programme.desc: (2022) Romance starring Jennifer Bonner. Landscape architect Evie is a hit with stubborn new client Ryan's daughters - leading her to realise she's the subject of Operation Grow a Girlfriend!

programme.title: Baking up Love
programme.desc: A confectionery store owner Lynn is convinced by the people of her town to enter the Great Pumpkin Bake Off. With the arrival of her unruly niece Julie, has she beaten of more than she can chew? (2021

programme.title: Baked With A Kiss
programme.desc: (2022) Culinary romance starring Jonathan Stoddard and Ansley Gordon. Renowned for her magical True Love pie, a baker accidentally serves one to a rude customer, who ends up falling in love with her.

programme.title: A Snapshot of Forever
programme.desc: After leaving her big city life behind, wedding photographer Jessie Brookes is happier than ever. When famous actor Nate Brown shows up on her parent's vineyard for his sister's wedding, she quickly realizes that there is more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Love In Wolf Creek
programme.desc: On the verge of losing her wildlife refuge, Sam, along with the town's handsome newcomer, Austin, risk it all to save an injured white wolf.

programme.title: Love at Sunset Terrace
programme.desc: Tired of her fast-paced life in the city, Sophie Carter travels to a small seaside town to disconnect and self-reflect, staying at an Airbnb run by a widowed father of a young girl.

programme.title: The Charm of Love
programme.desc: Art historian Madison “Maddie” TURNER, an expert in ancient artifacts and in deflecting unwanted male attention, travels halfway around the world to the Caribbeans in order to find the legendary "Lovers Stone".

programme.title: Marilyn Hotchkiss Ballroom Dancing & Charm School
programme.desc: A widowed man's life turns upside down when he embarks on a journey to find a dying man's long lost love.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend has dumped him so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing

programme.title: Forever In My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs—back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Romance Retreat
programme.desc: After a break-up, journalist Dana Willingham finds herself alone and stuck at a couple's yoga retreat while the biggest story of her career breaks far away.

programme.title: Heaven Is Waiting
programme.desc: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Romance
programme.desc: Actress Emma Hutton is determined to help find her friend Hope a perfect match but in doing so, she accidentally tramples on several hearts. When Emma realizes she herself has always loved her good friend Gray, Emma learns love works best when she doesn't meddle with it. A charming romance inspired by Jane Austen's "Emma."

programme.title: Finding Love in Big Sky
programme.desc: An independent country girl, Paisley, takes on the task of upholding her adored grandfather's ranch. After being denied the funding needed to refurbish the ranch, she is reintroduced to her ex-boyfriend Josh, a big-time marketing executive stationed in Denver who has been suspended from his current position at his company. Admitting to herself that she needs the help, Paisley agrees to work with Josh while he is town to come up with ideas on how to raise money for the farm.

programme.title: Cinderella in the Caribbean
programme.desc: Ashlyn Vanderbilt travels with her stepmother Miriam and her fiancé Bruce for their destination wedding. Although Ashlyn finds friendship and love with Bruce's son, Noah, she struggles to have her happily ever after when she discovers that her stepfamily plans to ruin Bruce.

programme.title: Romance on the Ranch
programme.desc: When her truck breaks down in the mid-west, Sara is invited to park her camper on a family ranch while her truck is repaired. She meets two brothers, who are as different as night and day. The brothers are instantly smitten with Sara and soon she begins to have feelings for them both. The last thing Sara expected to find was romance on the ranch.

programme.title: Trapped in the Farmhouse
programme.desc: A woman on the run from her abusive boyfriend seeks shelter in a farmhouse.

programme.title: Family in Hiding
programme.desc: After witnessing a murder, a single mother is forced to uproot her entire life.

programme.title: Hidden Family Secrets
programme.desc: Melanie and her daughter are adjusting to life after husband and dad Scott died.

programme.title: Someone is Trying to Ruin My Life
programme.desc: 45-year-old Mary Jo faced teen pregnancy and "sexting" issues as a teacher.

programme.title: Lies Beneath The Surface
programme.desc: Suspicious activity at a cabin sets off a deadly cat-and-mouse game of survival.

programme.title: Love You to Death
programme.desc: A prosecutor must work on a case which reminds her of her childhood, when her mother was killed by her alcoholic father.

programme.title: Killer Caregiver
programme.desc: After a woman is wounded in an accident, a young and attractive live-in caregiver moves into her home where strange and dangerous events unfold until the woman discovers her caregiver is hell-bent on destroying her life.

programme.title: Mommy Would Never Hurt You
programme.desc: Riley wants to rebuild her bond with her mom and sick sister, but uncovers a secret that changes everything.

programme.title: Alter
programme.desc: Alter, a psychological thriller about a man who is convinced that he's found his childhood abductor, and is determined to get him to confess by any means necessary.

programme.title: It Could Happen To You
programme.desc: Much to the horror of his upwardly mobile wife, a New York City cop makes good on his promise to split his lottery winnings with a waitress in this delightful comedy. Money changes everything, and all three lives are transformed in this charming comedy.

programme.title: No Census, No Feeling
programme.desc: The Stooges get jobs as census takers and wind up in a fancy mansion looking for people to survey. Moe and Larry are recruited to join a bridge game, while Curly adds Alum to the lemonade. The resulting concoction is consumed by everyone, resulting in puckered lips and shrunken clothes. The boys next try to take the census at a football stadium. They disguise themselves as players and wind up in the middle of the game. Curly runs off with the ball and all the other players in pursuit.

programme.title: Nutty But Nice
programme.desc: The Stooges are singing waiters who are enlisted by a doctor to try and cheer up a little girl. It seems that the girl's father is a banker who was kidnapped with $300,000 worth of bonds. Failing to cheer up the girl, the Stooges go out looking for the father and by a series of coincidences wind up in the bad guys hideout. The villains return and after a wild fight the boys free the missing man.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Funnyman Adam Sandler stars in MR. DEEDS, the hilarious remake of the classic American comedy Mr. Deeds Goes to Town.

programme.title: Paul Blart
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Paul Blart
programme.desc: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart (Kevin James) has earned a vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter and finds that safety never takes a holiday. When duty calls, Blart answers.

programme.title: Man, Pride & Vengeance
programme.desc: A stalwart Spanish soldier turns to a life of crime to prove his love for a mysterious and promiscuous gypsy woman.

programme.title: Heroes of Fort Worth
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a group of confederate soldiers with the help of Apache Indians, try to defeat a Union fort, while trying to gain support from Emperor Maximillian of Mexico.

programme.title: Toughest Man in Arizona
programme.desc: Marshal Landry captures outlaw Girard, but things turn deadly after an Indian attack leaves only a woman and two children alive. When Girard escapes with help from his brothers and robs a silver shipment, Landry uncovers betrayal, a tapped telegraph line, and a shocking revelation before the final showdown.

programme.title: Watch Out Gringo! Sabata Will Return
programme.desc: A gang of bandits, led by the infamous Luke Morgan, hijacks a stagecoach carrying an army gold strongbox and takes a hostage. But when Carrancho steals the gold from them, hiding it in a grave, the chase intensifies. Both sides race to recover the treasure, with lives at stake and a relentless pursuit in the wild.

programme.title: Passionate Stranger
programme.desc: When Carlo, a young and handsome Italian chauffeur, arrives to work in the household of Professor Winter and his wife Judith, he causes quite a flutter in the household. But when Carlo begins to imagine, through a simple misunderstanding that Judith is in love with him, life becomes very complicated indeed!

programme.title: Pool of London
programme.desc: A sailor and small-time smuggler, is caught trying to take some nylons from his girlfriend through customs.

programme.title: Twice Round the Daffodils
programme.desc: The film is a comedy take on the very serious issue in 50s England of TB and the recovery process from it.

programme.title: Birthday Present
programme.desc: Simon Scott's attempt to smuggle a watch through customs is discovered and he is charged by the police.

programme.title: Kingdom School
programme.desc: Tae-oh uses his outstanding brain not on academic studies but on other things. He managed to avoid bullies in first grade but still suffers from the higher-grade bullies. Tae-oh and his 4 friends just want to have peace from all the school violence. Unable to outsmart the bullies, Tae- oh eventually realized his own fighting talent.

programme.title: Mother and Mom EP01
programme.desc: When Seo-yoon's sitter suddenly ghosts her without warning, Jung-eun skips lunch to ride-share for Seo-yoon herself. To make matters worse, she receives a notification that her afternoon meeting has been moved up. With no other choice, she asks her own mother, Ji-ah, who works as an art therapist at a university hospital, to give Seo-yoon a ride to her academy?but then, Seo-yoon vanishes!!Jung-eun, a working mom and a 12-year veteran beauty marketer, struggles to get her 7-year-old daughter, Seo-yoon?who is preparing to enter elementary school?into Class A at Big Parker, the top-tier academy in Daechi-dong, and to secure her admission into the prestigious private Myeongsung Elementary School, all to ensure her future acceptance into a top Korean university.

programme.title: Mother and Mom EP02
programme.desc: Jung-eun busily rushes around to scout a new sitter and prepare for the speech contest upon which Seo-yoon's admission into Big Parker's Class A depends. Meanwhile, at the academy, Ji-ah encounters Tommy's grandfather, Young-wook, who has come for a one-day driving shift on behalf of Ho-kyung...Ji-ah's "riding" life?driving her granddaughter to and from her academies?begins on the sole condition that it will only last until they find a new sitter. Out of favor with Ho-kyung, the mom of Tommy, the top student at Big Parker, from her very first day of driving duty, Ji-ah meets Mi-choon, who is also exclusively in charge of driving and picking up her own granddaughter, and learns about the world of this "riding" subculture.

programme.title: Mother and Mom EP03
programme.desc: Ji-ah, who ended up leaving the hospital due to a defamatory post uploaded by a patient's guardian, decides to take charge of Seo-yoon's academy driving duties full-time. Meanwhile, Jung-eun stands up for what is right but cannot hold back her indignation, resulting in her getting saddled with the TR Project, which has been facing major difficulties within the company.As the highly anticipated day of the Myeongsung Elementary School lottery arrives, Ji-ah goes on an outing to the suburbs with the children, accompanied by Mi-choon and Young-wook. Jung-eun heads to the lottery venue with a desperate heart.

programme.title: Mother and Mom EP04
programme.desc: On the day of the speech contest, Jung-eun barely arrives in time for Seo-yoon's turn, only to be flustered to find that Seo-yoon's speech topic has been changed, leading her to demand an explanation from Ji-ah about what happened...Having failed to win the Myeongsung Elementary School lottery, Jung-eun decides to move to Gangnam as her next plan to secure admission into Gongnam Elementary School, a prestigious public school. While packing her belongings and leaving the hospital, Ji-ah runs into Young-wook by chance, and Young-wook offers her warm consolation.

programme.title: Mother and Mom EP05
programme.desc: Jung-eun's family is holding a party to celebrate Seo-yoon winning the grand prize at the speech contest. Just then, upon hearing the news that a unit has become available at Gongnam Apartment?which is required for admission into Gongnam Elementary School?Jung-eun rushes over to Gongnam-dong. Ho-kyung tells Min-ho that second place is a memory of failure and refuses to accept Min-ho's trophy brought by Young-wook, resulting in Young-wook no longer being able to handle Min-ho's driving duties. Expecting entry into Class A as a special privilege of the contest, Jung-eun attends a gathering of the Class A moms. At the gathering, Ho-kyung proposes three missions to secure admission into Class A Jung-eun accepts them and plunges Seo-yoon into a two-week "CSAT (college entrance exam) mode."

programme.title: Don't Buy The Seller
programme.desc: It all started with a second hand app. Soo-hyun's comment on the app makes her a serial killer's target.

programme.title: Architecture 101
programme.desc: Seung-min designs a house for his old crush and they are whisked back to the past which stirs old memories.

programme.title: Blue Swallow
programme.desc: Kyung-won has been dreaming of becoming a pilot. All she wants to do is flying back home with her plane.

programme.title: Boneless
programme.desc: On a business trip to Venice, a couple offers a ride to a mysterious hitchhiker. A wrong turn at the worst possible time will lead the protagonists into the middle of an intergalactic war between humans and aliens.

programme.title: Tangent Room
programme.desc: Trapped in a mysterious room with no escape, four brilliant minds race against time to prevent a cosmic collapse of the universe. They must learn to work together and solve the puzzle before it's too late.

programme.title: Lost in the Pacific
programme.desc: A luxury airline is making its maiden flight, with a group of VIP passengers on board, when disaster strikes. A mechanical failure forces the plane to crash land and it ends up on a remote Pacific island where passengers and crew must wait to be rescued.

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries: The Art of Murder
programme.desc: (2016) Detective drama with Lori Loughlin. While organising a charity event, intrepid second-hand sleuth Jennifer must dust off the clues when a generous donor meets an untimely end.

programme.title: Lost Letter Mysteries: The Impossible Dream
programme.desc: (2015) Heartwarming mystery starring Eric Mabius. The Postables work against the clock decoding a letter to rescue a soldier in Afghanistan and reunite her with her family.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries: Haunted By Murder
programme.desc: (2022) Spooky mystery with Candace Cameron Bure. Aida plans to flip a house where a teenage Aurora once discovered a body. The death was deemed accidental - but was it really?

programme.title: Winter Ridge
programme.desc: A young detective is torn apart after his wife ends up in a coma. Unable to accept her condition, he throws himself into a manhunt chasing a serial killer whose motives are connected to his wife.

programme.title: Salt and fire
programme.desc: A scientist blames the head of a large company for an ecological disaster in South America. But when a volcano begins to show signs of erupting, they must unite to avoid a disaster.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Con Man
programme.desc: The unbelievable true story of Barry Minkow, the youngest person ever to defraud Wall Street and who by the age of 21 was worth a staggering 100 million dollars.

programme.title: Under the Ice
programme.desc: Despite terrible weather, Sidney drags Nigel along to an Arctic base where an ancient Indian mummy has been found, who turns out to be an Anasazi.

programme.title: Antianeirai
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel travel to Istanbul to investigate the death of one Sydney's friends, a professor who was trying to prove Hercules did exist by finding the Belt of Hippolyte.

programme.title: Faux Fox
programme.desc: When Nigel is charmed by brilliant student Lorraine to show her their offices (and kiss), a burglar knocks out Sidney, but what was robbed?

programme.title: Pandoras Box
programme.desc: Sidney inherits from the best relic hunter of the previous generation a key and rushes with Nigel on the hunt for the one treasure he never found: Pandora's box.

programme.title: The Warlord
programme.desc: Bekkastan, 1401 AD: warrior princess Kahina proves her right to rule. 2002: Sydney and Nigel unearth a cave painting that might lead them to Kahina's Saddle. But her descendants cause complications.

programme.title: Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: While Nigel rehearses his keynote speech in a Seville hotel room, a girl nearly breaks his nose demanding something - it turns out she was after the water from the Fountain of Youth.

programme.title: Arthurs Cross
programme.desc: Scotland Yard calls Sidney and Nigel to identify a 5th century murder weapon. It turns out to be the burial cross of King Arthur, but besides the victim several others are looking for it.

programme.title: So Shall It Be
programme.desc: When Sidney and Nigel are about to enter the site of a Bristol lecture, a young author approaches them to follow up immediately on a tip about a map to the lost keys to the druid cult in Stonehenge.

programme.title: Alpha (2018)
programme.desc: Alpha is an epic adventure set in the last Ice Age. While on his first hunt with his tribe's most elite group, a young man is injured and left for dead. Awakening to find himself broken and alone, he must learn to survive and navigate the harsh and unforgiving wilderness.

programme.title: Blue Streak
programme.desc: Miles Logan (Martin Lawrence) is a talented jewel thief who has stolen $20 million dollars worth of diamonds and has hidden them at a construction site before being captured. Now, after three years in jail, he returns to pick up the diamonds only to find that the site is now a police precinct.

programme.title: Takers (2010)
programme.desc: Matt Dillon, Idris Elba, Paul Walker and Hayden Christiansen star in this action-packed thriller full of twists and turns.

programme.title: Priest (2011)
programme.desc: A warrior priest tracks down a band of renegade vampires who have kidnapped his niece.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Eleanor Rigby
programme.desc: This beautifully honest portrait of love follows the once happily married couple Conor and Eleanor. After being torn apart by tragedy, the couple find themselves strangers longing to reclaim the passion and life they once shared.

programme.title: The Man Without a Face
programme.desc: A drama film about a young boy who befriends a disfigured recluse in a small coastal town and helps him overcome his fear of society and confront his past.

programme.title: Please Stand By
programme.desc: A young autistic woman runs away from her caregiver to boldly go and deliver her 500-page Star Trek script to a writing competition in Hollywood. On an adventure full of laughter and tears, Wendy follows the guiding spirit of Mr. Spock on her journey into the unknown.

programme.title: Magic Beyond Words
programme.desc: An inspiring look at JK Rowling's rise to become one of the most influential writers-from her humble beginnings, as an imaginative young girl and awkward teenager, to the loss of her mother and the genesis of the Harry Potter phenomenon.

programme.title: Behind The Line
programme.desc: Occupied France, 1940. A Nazi Commander discovers one of his prisoners, Danny (Sam Gittins) is a champion boxer. He forces him to fight for his companies entertainment.

programme.title: Snitch
programme.desc: In the fast-paced action thriller SNITCH, Dwayne Johnson stars as a father whose teenage son is wrongly accused of a drug distribution crime and is looking at a mandatory minimum prison sentence of 10 years.

programme.title: Night Train
programme.desc: In this tightly crafted action thriller, a single mother struggling to survive agrees to run black market medical supplies in her legendary pick-up truck, "Night Train", with the FBI in hot pursuit.

programme.title: Saints & Soliders 2: Airborne Creed
programme.desc: On August 15th 1944, the 517th Parachute Regimental Combat Team (PRCT) jumped over the south of France. In their effort to complete the mission and rendezvous with their unit, three isolated paratroopers come across a group of French resistants in desperate need.
